name: Walk + Field Session
desc: Dogs need movement, time to sniff, and room to just be dogs. That's what I focus on. No pack walks.I prioritize quality over quantity—giving dogs exercise, enrichment, and the space to move at their own pace.

name: Adventure Hike
desc: We spend our time exploring trails in and around Atlanta, giving dogs the opportunity to exercise and explore the outdoors. Adventures are GPS tracked, structured, and kept small so every dog gets the attention they deserve. Pick-up, drop-off, water, treats, and an all-around great time are included.

name: Overnight Stay
desc:
In my experience, pets are happiest when they can stay in their own environment. I do my best to keep their routine consistent, give them plenty of company, and make sure they're comfortable while you're away. Every pet and every household is different, so care is always tailored to fit your needs. 
| |  • This one is for the cats too! 😻
note: flat rate · no extras  · full 24 hours

name: Drop In
desc: Drop-in visits are made to fit  your dog's routine and needs. Whether that's a potty break, a meal, medication, playtime, or just some company, I make sure they get the care and attention they deserve—without rushing through the visit.
note: flat rate ·  choose what time works best for you
